/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/static_udp.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/static_udp.dir/static_udp_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/static_udp.dir/udp.cpp.o -o static_udp  /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/local/lib/libudp.a /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
